title: Multi-step approval matrix for non-PO spend
pain_description: Employee needs $5K SaaS; 4 approvers across 3 tools; Slack DM + email chain; approvals die in inbox.
santifer_pattern: Intake form + policy engine + approver routing + escalation agent

title: Renewal calendar for 200+ SaaS contracts
pain_description: Auto-renew clauses hit silently; teams re-sign for 3 years at old terms; leverage lost.
santifer_pattern: Contract calendar + 90d alert + negotiate agent + benchmark DB

title: New-hire access provisioning across 30 tools
pain_description: Each new hire: Slack, GitHub, Salesforce, Figma, Asana. IT burns hour per hire; permissions creep.
santifer_pattern: Role template + SCIM + LLM-exception handler + offboard tracker

title: Offboarding: revoke access + recover data + final paycheck
pain_description: Departing employee still has access days later; laptop return slow; final pay miscalc.
santifer_pattern: Trigger + revoke cascade + laptop RMA + final-pay calc + exit docs

title: Meeting transcription + action item follow-through
pain_description: Fireflies transcripts pile; action items never enter Jira; follow-up forgotten.
santifer_pattern: Transcript + AI action-item extractor + Jira/Linear push + follow-up agent

title: Exec assistant scheduling + inbox triage
pain_description: Exec inbox floods; calendar Tetris; EA burnout.
santifer_pattern: Inbox + calendar + LLM prioritizer + autonomous scheduler

title: Slack noise → signal for leaders
pain_description: 30 channels + DMs; can't catch up after PTO; meetings instead of reading.
santifer_pattern: Channel ingest + per-user priority model + digest + action-prompt

title: OKRs / goals tracking that actually happens
pain_description: Quarterly OKRs set; never revisited; performance suffers.
santifer_pattern: Goal + progress signals + weekly nudge + LLM-drafted update

title: QBR / executive business review preparation
pain_description: Quarterly review = days of data pulls + deck building; customer delays; retention risk.
santifer_pattern: Usage + tickets + meetings + LLM deck + customer-value narrative

title: Customer health score model tuning
pain_description: Static health scores miss churn; data drift; false comfort.
santifer_pattern: Multi-signal + ML model + explainer + LLM outreach drafter

title: Field ops ticket triage for MSPs
pain_description: Client tickets across 50 clients; skill+priority+SLA juggling manual; after-hours fire.
santifer_pattern: Ticket intake + classifier + dispatch + SLA monitor

title: MSP quarterly business review with clients
pain_description: QBRs must show value (tickets resolved, uptime, patches). report assembly slow.
santifer_pattern: RMM + PSA + patch data + LLM narrative + deck

title: License compliance audits (Microsoft, Adobe, Autodesk)
pain_description: Vendor audits threaten 7-fig fines; true-up demands proof; spreadsheets brittle.
santifer_pattern: SAM feed + entitlement DB + usage + audit-ready pack

title: Internal Q&A: people keep asking the same Slack questions
pain_description: 'Where's the latest pricing deck?' asked daily; time lost.
santifer_pattern: Slack/Drive RAG + @bot answerer + auto-wiki update

title: Engineering hiring: scheduling panels globally
pain_description: 5-stage loop, 6 interviewers, global time zones; back-and-forth kills candidate experience.
santifer_pattern: Candidate pref + interviewer calendar + LLM optimizer + auto-reschedule

title: Engineer leveling + calibration
pain_description: Calibration meetings 6-8 hrs; subjective debates; outcomes uneven.
santifer_pattern: Signals + rubric + LLM level assessment + bias-check

title: Compensation benchmarking + band updates
pain_description: Comp bands lag market; Radford/Mercer surveys lag; offer rejects pile.
incumbent_gap: Surveys; live market-data + LLM mapping thin
santifer_pattern: Live comp data + role mapping agent + band update proposal

title: Employee relocation + visa coordination
pain_description: H-1B, relocation, housing, shipping, schools. global movers overwhelmed.
santifer_pattern: Employee intake + country rule + visa filer + relo concierge

title: Learning management for compliance training
pain_description: Annual training assignments; completion tracking; regulator asks for proof.
santifer_pattern: Course SSOT + auto-assign + nudge agent + audit report

title: Board reporting for PE portfolio companies
pain_description: Monthly/quarterly KPI + narrative from 10+ portcos; formats differ; value-creation plan hard to track.
santifer_pattern: Portco data ingest + KPI normalizer + LLM narrative + VCP tracker

title: Capacity planning + hiring-plan modeling
pain_description: Hiring plan + attrition + productivity ramp = Excel spaghetti; plans stale in 2 weeks.
santifer_pattern: HRIS + productivity model + LLM what-if + scenario compare

title: Sales territory mapping + realignment
pain_description: Territory carve changes mid-year = revenue disruption; Excel model balance hard.
santifer_pattern: TAM + account-fit + rep skill + LLM proposer + transition plan

title: Channel partner enablement + deal registration
pain_description: Partner deal reg conflicts; MDF tracking; partners go dark.
santifer_pattern: Deal-reg intake + conflict detector + MDF tracker + partner nudge

title: Partner marketplace co-sell motion (AWS, Azure, GCP)
pain_description: AWS ISV Accelerate / Azure MACC reqs; rep alignment; deal registration byzantine.
santifer_pattern: Deal pipeline sync + MP listings + rep-alignment agent

title: SaaS commerce: trial → paid conversion experiments
pain_description: Trial users drop; experiments take weeks to run; signal fuzzy.
santifer_pattern: Signal + hypothesis + LLM experiment design + auto-report

title: Procurement: RFI / RFP vendor evaluation matrix
pain_description: Evaluating 10 vendors; matrix + references + demos; decision takes 2 months.
santifer_pattern: Criteria + vendor ingest + LLM matrix + risk narrative

title: Vendor performance reviews + scorecards
pain_description: Quarterly reviews; scorecards manual; renewals proceed without data.
santifer_pattern: SLA + invoice + ticket data + LLM scorecard + renewal recommender

title: Real-time travel & expense approval
pain_description: Policy violations caught post-trip; refund disputes; expensive to enforce in advance.
santifer_pattern: Booking intake + policy check + auto-approve in-policy + flag outliers

title: Sales enablement: updating battlecards + collateral
pain_description: Collateral lives in Drive; reps can't find; updates slow; outdated pitches.
santifer_pattern: Source-of-truth + change detector + per-persona update + deliver to rep

title: Customer-facing documentation keep up-to-date
pain_description: Product ships daily; docs lag weeks; support tickets rise as proxy.
santifer_pattern: PR diff → doc-update proposer + screenshot refresh + publish

title: API changelog + deprecation comms
pain_description: API changes break customers; comms manual; tickets explode.
santifer_pattern: API diff + LLM changelog + per-customer impact + email agent

title: Developer community support triage
pain_description: Discord + GitHub + Stack Overflow; devs burnout; answers inconsistent.
santifer_pattern: Cross-platform intake + docs RAG + answer + escalation

title: Paid ad creative compliance review
pain_description: Meta/Google reject creatives; resubmit cycles; launch slips.
santifer_pattern: Creative ingest + platform policy RAG + LLM reviewer + auto-fix

title: Creator / influencer contract compliance
pain_description: Influencers miss FTC disclosure; brand safety risk.
santifer_pattern: Post monitor + FTC rule engine + flag + remediation request

title: Annual planning: goals → OKRs → budgets → hiring
pain_description: Q4 annual planning = 6 weeks of exec time; artifacts fragmented.
santifer_pattern: Strategy doc + team input + LLM cascade + budget + hiring tie-in

title: Competitive win/loss analysis
pain_description: W/L interviews expensive; insights stale; reps don't see patterns.
santifer_pattern: Call recordings + LLM loss reason classifier + pattern report

title: Feature flag hygiene: zombie flags
pain_description: Flags multiply; 20% are zombies; code tangled; toggle debt.
santifer_pattern: Flag usage + LLM sunset recommender + PR generator

title: Incident comms to customers (status pages)
pain_description: Status page updates delayed; customers scream; comms team panics.
santifer_pattern: Incident signals + audience-specific LLM update + multi-channel push

title: Engineering planning: dependencies across squads
pain_description: Cross-team dependencies tracked in spreadsheets; slippage cascades.
santifer_pattern: Epic dependency graph + risk detector + exec digest

title: Lean bookkeeping for very small businesses
pain_description: QuickBooks too complex; hand-typing everything; books lag; tax surprise.
santifer_pattern: Bank + receipt + LLM categorizer + monthly close agent

title: Cash-flow forecasting for SMBs
pain_description: Owner doesn't know if next month's payroll clears; hand-Excel.
santifer_pattern: Bank + AP + AR + LLM predictor + alert agent

title: Payroll tax filings for multi-state SMBs
pain_description: Each state = registration + quarterly filings; missing one = penalties.
santifer_pattern: Employee state + auto-registration + filings + audit trail

title: 1099 vendor payment compliance
pain_description: W-9 absent; year-end 1099 scramble; penalties for misses.
santifer_pattern: Vendor W-9 agent + 1099 generator + e-file + corrections

title: Sales tax nexus monitoring (Wayfair post)
pain_description: Every state = threshold + reg; Wayfair changed everything; miss nexus = back-taxes.
santifer_pattern: Revenue by state + nexus monitor + reg + filings

title: Independent contractor classification audit
pain_description: CA AB5 + IRS 20-factor; misclass = back-taxes + lawsuits.
santifer_pattern: Contract + relationship factors + LLM risk score + remediation

title: Insurance policy management for SMBs
pain_description: GL, workers comp, cyber, E&O renewals; broker slow; certificates of insurance (COI) needed fast.
santifer_pattern: Policy registry + renewal agent + instant COI + audit pack

title: Receptionist + physical mailroom automation
pain_description: Packages + visitors + mail still require human at front; 5-person co wastes seat.
santifer_pattern: Digital sign-in + package photo + recipient alert + visitor badge

title: Workplace IT: video conference + AV support
pain_description: 'Zoom isn't working' calls 5×/day; IT runs to rooms; meetings stall.
santifer_pattern: Room health monitor + LLM troubleshoot + remote-fix + auto-ticket

title: Event management: internal summits, offsites
pain_description: Offsite logistics, travel, hotels, dietary, activities. manual spreadsheets.
santifer_pattern: Attendee intake + travel agent + hotel + schedule optimizer

title: Sales + finance alignment: quote → contract → revenue
pain_description: CPQ → signed contract → activation → billing → RevRec; each handoff breaks.
santifer_pattern: Unified SSOT + handoff agents + reconciliation + audit
